ratchet: Default gate requires exact diagnostic equality. Fixes must update this baseline so resolved diagnostics cannot reappear unnoticed.

staged_inclusion.current_gate: Live price/provider polling files are included now.
staged_inclusion.justification: Remaining historical, research, and alternative ingestion jobs need type cleanup before full-package gating.

staged_inclusion.current_gate: Broker routing, order apply, idempotency, kill-switch, reconciliation, and ledger files are included now.
staged_inclusion.justification: Remaining analytics, training, and broker-adapter files are staged after the live order path.

staged_inclusion.current_gate: The full risk package is included now.
staged_inclusion.justification: Risk contains the portfolio and Monte Carlo engines that directly size capital.

staged_inclusion.current_gate: Live gates, preflight, read routers, Postgres storage, and Timescale client files are included now.
staged_inclusion.justification: Remaining runtime modules include broad startup, health, and operator support surfaces with legacy typing debt.

staged_inclusion.current_gate: Portfolio, portfolio risk gate, predictor, and champion manager files are included now.
staged_inclusion.justification: Remaining strategy modules include research-only model families and feature discovery surfaces.
